overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist Aloy exploring a vibrant geothermal landscape with colorful mineral pools and snow-capped mountains. The scene transitions from peaceful exploration through the hot springs to a dramatic encounter with a massive volcanic eruption in the distance, complete with ash clouds, fire, and lightning.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal hot spring basin with vibrant mineral deposits

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shallow colorful geothermal water toward the forested shoreline

entered.detail: vibrant multi-colored mineral water with yellow, green, and blue hues
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the distance
dense pine trees lining the left side of the basin
dense pine trees lining the right side of the basin
rising mist and steam from the hot spring surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a stunning geothermal basin with vividly colored mineral waters in shades of turquoise, green, and yellow. Steam rises from the hot springs while snow-capped mountains loom in the distance beyond the surrounding coniferous forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail at the edge of geothermal basin

events.description: massive volcanic eruption begins in the distance with dark smoke column and fire

agents.ego_description: walking onto the shore and dirt path while turning to look at the sudden volcanic eruption appearing on the horizon

entered.detail: earthen path along the shore of the geothermal pool
massive dark ash cloud with orange fire at its base rising into the sky
dead burned tree trunks near the eruption site

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the water onto a dirt trail as a massive volcanic eruption suddenly appears in the distance. Dark smoke and fire billow from the horizon while the character continues walking and turning to observe the dramatic environmental event.

scene_state.functional_zone: volcanic eruption observation point with massive ash column

events.description: character stops walking and stands still to observe the eruption
lightning strikes within the volcanic ash cloud

agents.ego_description: standing still with hand raised to shield eyes, watching the massive volcanic eruption and lightning strikes in the distance

entered.detail: electrical discharges flashing within the dark ash cloud

segments.scene_description: The character stops to witness the awe-inspiring volcanic eruption dominating the sky. Massive dark ash clouds swirl with fire and lightning, obscuring the mountains as the character stands transfixed by the destructive natural phenomenon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene geothermal basin that transforms into a scene of volcanic devastation. It begins with the character walking through vividly colored mineral waters of turquoise, green, and yellow, as steam rises against a backdrop of distant snow-capped mountains and coniferous forests. As the character transitions from the water onto a dirt trail, the peaceful atmosphere shifts when a massive volcanic eruption suddenly appears on the horizon, billowing dark smoke and fire. The scene then expands to show the character stopping to observe the event, while the sky is overtaken by swirling dark ash clouds filled with fire and lightning. Finally, the destructive natural phenomenon completely dominates the view, obscuring the mountains as the character stands transfixed.
